creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 1.4.2

Note: for removing MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILD, we need following ports:

x11-toolkits/py25-tkinter
graphics/py25-imaging
databases/py25-sqlite3

Although I've prepared these ports, I'm still thinking if it is a good idea.
I would like have comments from maintainer and others.

Port maintainer (nivit@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
